basic_details.job_title: A&N UT Health Mission Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 10 Data Analyst, Accountant and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Andaman & Nicobar Union Territory Health Mission
basic_details.post_name: MIS/Data Analyst, System Administrator, Accountant, HMIS Assistant
basic_details.short_information: Andaman & Nicobar Union Territory Health Mission (A&N UT Health Mission) MIS/Data Analyst, System Administrator, Accountant, HMIS Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on the official website. A total of 10 vacancies have been announced through the A&N UT Health Mission Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 60 years Age relaxation will be as per the rules.

qualification.education_qualification: BE/B.Tech/MCA/MBA/Master's in Public Health, Any Graduate, M.Com/B.Com, Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science/IT/BCA/Electronics
qualification.details: MIS/Data Analyst (PMU, South Andaman): BE/B.Tech OR MCA OR MBA/Post Graduate Diploma in Management OR Master's in Public Health from a recognized institute with 3+ years of working experience and proficiency in MS Office suite. Preference for health sector experience. System Administrator (PMU, South Andaman & North & Middle Andaman): Any Graduate with relevant certifications (e.g. CompTIA A+, MCSA) preferred. Proven experience as System Admin/IT Technician, experience with LAN/WAN networks, thorough knowledge of computer systems and IT components, good knowledge of internet security and data privacy, excellent troubleshooting and communication skills. Accountant (PMU, South Andaman): M.Com from a recognized university with computer knowledge OR B.Com with at least three years of experience in Accounting & Finance. Coordinates budget preparation, monitors accounts, prepares Utilization Certificate, coordinates with the auditor. HMIS Assistant (South Andaman District & North & Middle Andaman District): Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science/Information Technology/Computer Applications (BCA)/Electronics & Communication/Information Systems from a recognized University/Institution. Preferably 2+ years of experience in a government project. Proficiency in MS Office, data management, and basic system administration.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for A&N UT Health Mission Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 10-08-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: A&N UT Health Mission Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: MIS/Data Analyst (PMU, South Andaman): BE/B.Tech OR MCA OR MBA/Post Graduate Diploma in Management OR Master's in Public Health from a recognized institute with 3+ years of working experience and proficiency in MS Office suite. Preference for health sector experience. System Administrator (PMU, South Andaman & North & Middle Andaman): Any Graduate with relevant certifications (e.g. CompTIA A+, MCSA) preferred. Proven experience as System Admin/IT Technician, experience with LAN/WAN networks, thorough knowledge of computer systems and IT components, good knowledge of internet security and data privacy, excellent troubleshooting and communication skills. Accountant (PMU, South Andaman): M.Com from a recognized university with computer knowledge OR B.Com with at least three years of experience in Accounting & Finance. Coordinates budget preparation, monitors accounts, prepares Utilization Certificate, coordinates with the auditor. HMIS Assistant (South Andaman District & North & Middle Andaman District): Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science/Information Technology/Computer Applications (BCA)/Electronics & Communication/Information Systems from a recognized University/Institution. Preferably 2+ years of experience in a government project. Proficiency in MS Office, data management, and basic system administration.

content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 60 years Age relaxation will be as per the rules.

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for A&N UT Health Mission Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 10-08-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: A&N UT Health Mission Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the A&N UT Health Mission Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the A&N UT Health Mission Recruitment 2026 is 10 August 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in the A&N UT Health Mission Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 10 vacancies announced for the posts of MIS/Data Analyst, System Administrator, Accountant, and HMIS Assistant in the A&N UT Health Mission Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the A&N UT Health Mission Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post or as specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the A&N UT Health Mission posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit for all posts is 21 years, and the maximum age limit is 60 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required for the MIS/Data Analyst post?
faq.answer: For the MIS/Data Analyst post, candidates should possess a BE/B.Tech OR MCA OR MBA/Post Graduate Diploma in Management OR Master's in Public Health from a recognized institute with 3+ years of working experience.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the HMIS Assistant post?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the HMIS Assistant post is Rs. 20,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the A&N UT Health Mission Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the A&N UT Health Mission Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the A&N UT Health Mission Recruitment 2026 will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF link will be available in the "Important Links" section of this article. It is recommended to download and read it thoroughly.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The job type for all the positions announced in the A&N UT Health Mission Recruitment 2026 is Contractual.
